summary: Iteration 11: Frontend-only testing of Platform Mode Toggle functionality. All 8 requested features verified working correctly. Minor calculation logic issues identified for main agent review.

issues: React warning: <button> cannot be a descendant of <button> in AccordionTrigger (existing issue from iteration_10)

passed_tests: Platform Mode Toggle - NIOS mode: GM/GMC roles available, first DC defaults to GM, subsequent DCs to GMC
Platform Mode Toggle - UDDI mode: GM/GMC roles NOT available (only DNS, DHCP, DNS/DHCP)
Platform Mode Toggle - UDDI mode: All sites show DNS/DHCP roles
Platform Mode Toggle - Hybrid mode: GM/GMC roles available
Platform Mode Toggle - 'Not Recommended' badge appears when selecting UDDI or Hybrid (NIOS recommended for 4 DCs + 1 Site)
Platform Mode Toggle - Star icon shows on NIOS (recommended platform)
Platform dropdown options change based on platform mode: NIOS mode = NIOS Physical/Virtual/HA Pair
Platform dropdown options change based on platform mode: UDDI mode = NIOS-X Virtual Server/NIOS-X as a Service
Platform dropdown options change based on platform mode: Hybrid = all 5 options (NIOS Physical, NIOS Virtual, NIOS HA Pair, NIOS-X VS, NXaaS)
Role dropdown in Site Sizing table updates based on platform mode: NIOS/Hybrid = 5 options (GM, GMC, DNS, DHCP, DNS/DHCP)
Role dropdown in Site Sizing table updates based on platform mode: UDDI = 3 options (DNS, DHCP, DNS/DHCP)
Site calculations: For NIOS GM/GMC roles, IPs equal KW (grid objects) - verified 25 KW = 25 IPs for GM
Site calculations: For DNS/DHCP roles, IPs = KW × multiplier - verified 25 KW × 2.5 = 63 IPs in UDDI mode
Summary badges update correctly: NIOS shows '1 GM, 3 GMC, 1 Members', UDDI shows '5 Members'
action_items: CALCULATION REVIEW: getSiteRecommendedModel() in calculations.js doesn't handle DNS/DHCP combined role with multi-role penalty (multiRolePenaltyPercent: 50)
CALCULATION REVIEW: getSiteRecommendedModel() doesn't have special handling for GM/GMC roles - falls through to DHCP calculation
BUG: isUDDI detection in getSiteRecommendedModel() checks for 'NX' but actual platform values are 'NXVS' and 'NXaaS' - line 83-84
MINOR: All sites show same model (TE-926) and tokens (880) regardless of IPs/role - model recommendation may not be working correctly
critical_code_review_comments: TokenCalculatorSummary.jsx: Platform toggle UI working correctly with proper state management
TokenCalculatorSummary.jsx: PLATFORM_MODES, PLATFORM_OPTIONS_BY_MODE, ROLE_OPTIONS_BY_MODE constants correctly defined
TokenCalculatorSummary.jsx: sites useMemo correctly handles platform-specific logic for GM/GMC IPs = KW
calculations.js: getSiteRecommendedModel() needs enhancement for combined DNS/DHCP role with QPS+LPS penalties
calculations.js: isUDDI detection bug - should check for 'NXVS' not 'NX'
seed_data_creation: Used existing 'Test Customer Frontend' with 4 DCs (test:25KW, test:24KW, New DC Test:0KW, Test DC 5000KW:0KW) and 1 Site (test:0KW)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Platform Mode Toggle functionality verified working. NIOS mode shows GM/GMC roles with IPs=KW, UDDI mode shows only DNS/DHCP roles with IPs=KW×multiplier, Hybrid shows all options. 'Not Recommended' badge appears correctly. Calculation logic in getSiteRecommendedModel() may need review for combined roles and UDDI platform detection.

nios_mode.default_dc_roles: First DC = GM, subsequent DCs = GMC

hybrid_mode.default_dc_roles: First DC = GM, subsequent DCs = GMC

getSiteRecommendedModel_issues: Line 82-84: isUDDI check uses 'NX' but should use 'NXVS' - sitePlatform values are 'NXVS' and 'NXaaS'
Line 89-103: Only handles 'DNS' role explicitly, all other roles (including DNS/DHCP) fall through to DHCP logic
Missing: Combined DNS/DHCP role should calculate both QPS and LPS, apply multiRolePenaltyPercent (50%)
Missing: GM/GMC roles should use grid object calculations, not DNS/DHCP calculations
